data.title: Persistent Opens Melbourne Innovation Center to Support Enterprise Modernization and AI Adoption
data.description: Persistent Systems (BSE: 533179, NSE: PERSISTENT) recently enhanced their growth strategy in ANZ by emphasizing innovation, talent development, and enterprise transformation. This move in Melbourne, Australia and Pune, India showcases their commitment to the region. On March 5, 2026, Persistent Systems has taken significant steps to bolster their presence in the market.

data.title: Neolix RoboVans Adopted by IKEA China After Successful Pilot
data.description: In HEFEI, China, on March 5, 2026, IKEA China announced the integration of Neolix autonomous vehicles into their operations after a successful trial in Anhui Province. The pilot program resulted in a significant 66% reduction in average customer waiting times. This implementation not only enhances the customer experience but also boosts workplace efficiency. The move signifies a positive step towards innovation and technological advancement in the retail sector.

data.title: South Korea's stock index faced volatility due to US and Israeli attacks on Iran, surviving a 24-hour period with major fluctuations.
data.description: Following a period of significant growth, the nation's key stock index experienced a sharp decline before subsequently recovering, all in response to the military actions carried out by the United States and Israel against Iran.

data.title: $1.7B stablecoin inflows surge by 414% amid Washington yield rules debate, stalling US market discussions.
data.description: According to data from Messari, there has been a significant 414% increase in weekly inflows of stablecoins, reaching $1.7 billion. This surge comes amidst an ongoing debate regarding yield-bearing stablecoins, causing a delay in discussions surrounding the structure of the US market.
